basic_details.job_title: SGPGIMS Lucknow – Technician, Junior Engineer and More – 47 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS), Lucknow
basic_details.post_name: Various Group B & C Posts (Technical Officer, Junior Engineer, Perfusionist, Technicians, etc.)
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS Lucknow) aims to fill 47 vacancies of Technician, Junior Engineer and More Posts for Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, with applications accepted online from 19-05-2026 to 09-06-2026 through the official website sgpgims.org.in.

selection_process: Computer Based Test (CBT) + Skill Test (wherever applicable) + Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply **online only** through the official website http://www.sgpgims.org.in. No other mode of application will be accepted. Candidates can apply for multiple posts but must submit separate applications and pay separate fees for each post.
seo_tags: SGPGIMS Lucknow Group B & C Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 47 Technician, Junior Engineer and More Posts
